title: neolepisorus ovatus f. truncatus
intro: Neolepisorus ovatus f. truncatus, also known as the truncated Neolepisorus ovatus, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Neolepisorus ovatus f. truncatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestive health, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
